allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 - <<'EOF'
import json, requests, certifi

api_key = open\(".env"\).read\(\).split\("="\)[1].strip\(\)
url = f"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key={api_key}"
resp = requests.get\(url, verify=certifi.where\(\)\)
models = resp.json\(\).get\("models", []\)

for m in models:
    methods = m.get\("supportedGenerationMethods", []\)
    if any\(x in str\(methods\).lower\(\) for x in ["image", "predict", "generate"]\):
        print\(f"{m['name']}"\)
        print\(f"  methods: {methods}"\)
        print\(f"  description: {m.get\('description',''\)[:120]}"\)
        print\(\)
EOF)
